requirement_topic.en: ONEE Grid-Connection Requirements and Loi 13-09 Renewable-Energy Framework
requirement_topic.zh: ONEE并网要求与loi 13-09可再生能源法框架
requirement_topic.zht: ONEE併網要求與loi 13-09再生能源法框架

summary.en: Morocco's national electricity utility ONEE (Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable) is the grid operator and publishes grid-connection technical rules for power plants and distributed generation, including rooftop solar under loi 47-09 and loi 13-09 framework. Loi 13-09 (as amended by loi 58-15) establishes the legal basis for renewable energy production, self-production, and grid access. Grid-connected inverters must meet ONEE's technical requirements for voltage and frequency ride-through, anti-islanding, reactive-power control, protection coordination, power quality, and metering. ONEE may require project-specific studies for larger installations. Rooftop and small systems use net-metering decrees under loi 47-09.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥国家电力和饮用水局（ONEE）是电网运营商，就电厂和分布式发电（包括loi 47-09和loi 13-09框架下的屋顶光伏）发布并网技术规则。loi 13-09（经loi 58-15修订）确立了可再生能源生产、自发自用和电网接入的法律基础。并网逆变器须满足ONEE对电压和频率穿越、防孤岛、无功控制、保护配合、电能质量和计量的技术要求。ONEE对较大装机容量项目可能要求项目级研究。屋顶和小型系统依据loi 47-09下的净计量法令执行。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥國家電力和飲用水局（ONEE）是電網營運商，就電廠和分布式發電（包括loi 47-09和loi 13-09框架下的屋頂光伏）發布併網技術規則。loi 13-09（經loi 58-15修訂）確立了再生能源生產、自發自用和電網接入的法律基礎。併網逆變器須滿足ONEE對電壓和頻率穿越、防孤島、無功控制、保護配合、電能質量和計量的技術要求。ONEE對較大裝機容量項目可能要求項目級研究。屋頂和小型系統依據loi 47-09下的淨計量法令執行。

standards_or_laws: Loi 13-09 relative aux énergies renouvelables (as amended by loi 58-15)
Loi 47-09 relative à l'efficacité énergétique (self-consumption and net-metering decrees)
ONEE technical grid-connection rules for distributed generation and renewable power plants

summary.en: China grid-connection evidence for PV inverters commonly cites GB/T 19964 (technical requirements for PV power stations connecting to power systems) and GB/T 37408. These standards address similar technical areas but are written for the Chinese 50 Hz grid and regulatory framework; they are not acceptable as ONEE grid-connection studies or Morocco project-approval documentation.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常引用GB/T 19964（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术要求）和GB/T 37408。这些标准涵盖类似技术领域，但针对中国50 Hz电网和监管框架编写，不能作为ONEE并网研究或摩洛哥项目批准文件接受。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常引用GB/T 19964（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術要求）和GB/T 37408。這些標準涵蓋類似技術領域，但針對中國50 Hz電網和監管框架編寫，不能作為ONEE併網研究或摩洛哥項目批准文件接受。

gap.en: Prepare a Morocco-specific ONEE grid settings sheet covering: voltage and frequency ride-through windows for the 50 Hz Moroccan grid, reactive-power Q(U) and Q(P) behaviour, anti-islanding method, reconnection delay, active power curtailment interface, protection relay settings, metering point, and power quality compliance. Submit project-specific grid studies for installations above the distributed-generation threshold. Confirm the applicable route under loi 13-09 or loi 47-09 with ONEE and the Moroccan energy regulator.
gap.zh: 应准备摩洛哥特定的ONEE并网设置表，涵盖：摩洛哥50 Hz电网电压和频率穿越窗口、无功Q(U)和Q(P)行为、防孤岛方法、重连延时、有功限发接口、保护继电器设置、计量点和电能质量合规。超过分布式发电门槛的装机容量需提交项目级并网研究。应与ONEE及摩洛哥能源监管机构确认适用的loi 13-09或loi 47-09路径。
gap.zht: 應準備摩洛哥特定的ONEE併網設定表，涵蓋：摩洛哥50 Hz電網電壓和頻率穿越窗口、無功Q(U)和Q(P)行為、防孤島方法、重連延時、有功限發介面、保護繼電器設定、計量點和電能質量合規。超過分布式發電門檻的裝機容量需提交項目級併網研究。應與ONEE及摩洛哥能源監管機構確認適用的loi 13-09或loi 47-09路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected PV inverters under ONEE technical rules; loi 13-09 / loi 47-09 license or declaration is mandatory for the project as a whole
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid-connected PV projects under CNCA and NB/T 32004; not transferable as ONEE grid approval

source.publisher: Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable (ONEE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 19964 grid documentation does not satisfy ONEE grid-connection approval. Prepare Morocco-specific ONEE settings and project-specific studies, and confirm the applicable loi 13-09 or loi 47-09 licence route before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 19964并网文件不满足ONEE并网批准要求。出货前应准备摩洛哥特定的ONEE设置表和项目级研究，并确认适用的loi 13-09或loi 47-09许可路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 19964併網文件不滿足ONEE併網批准要求。出貨前應準備摩洛哥特定的ONEE設定表和項目級研究，並確認適用的loi 13-09或loi 47-09許可路徑。

requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Frequency and Voltage Settings for Morocco
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥50 Hz电网频率与电压设置
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥50 Hz電網頻率與電壓設定

summary.en: Morocco operates a 50 Hz grid with low-voltage nominal voltage of 220 V (single phase) and 400 V (three phase), interconnected with the European ENTSO-E synchronous area via submarine cable links to Spain. Inverters must be configured for 50 Hz operation, and frequency ride-through, trip thresholds, reconnection delay, and power-reduction gradients should follow ONEE technical rules and European / IEC practice, not Chinese GB/T settings calibrated for the Chinese 50 Hz grid's distinct frequency and voltage tolerance bands.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥采用50 Hz电网，低压标称电压为220 V（单相）/400 V（三相），通过与西班牙的海底电缆与欧洲ENTSO-E同步区互联。逆变器必须配置为50 Hz运行，频率穿越、跳闸阈值、重连延时和降功率梯度应遵循ONEE技术规则及欧洲/IEC实践，而非针对中国50 Hz电网不同频率和电压容差带校准的GB/T设置。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥採用50 Hz電網，低壓標稱電壓為220 V（單相）/400 V（三相），通過與西班牙的海底電纜與歐洲ENTSO-E同步區互聯。逆變器必須配置為50 Hz運行，頻率穿越、跳閘閾值、重連延時和降功率梯度應遵循ONEE技術規則及歐洲/IEC實踐，而非針對中國50 Hz電網不同頻率和電壓容差帶校準的GB/T設定。

standards_or_laws: ONEE technical grid-connection requirements for distributed PV generation
IEC 61727 (PV systems — characteristics of the utility interface)
ENTSO-E Network Code on Requirements for Generators (NC RfG) — relevant for larger plants seeking export or cross-border context

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters default to settings under GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 for the Chinese 50 Hz grid. While the nominal frequency matches, trip windows, reconnection sequences, reactive-power curve shapes, and active-power response ramps may differ from ONEE or ENTSO-E expectations. Chinese inverters typically support multi-market configuration; firmware parameter adjustment for the Morocco market is necessary.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器默认按GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964针对中国50 Hz电网设置。虽然标称频率相同，但跳闸窗口、重连顺序、无功曲线形状和有功响应斜率可能与ONEE或ENTSO-E要求不同。中国逆变器通常支持多市场配置；需要针对摩洛哥市场调整固件参数。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器默認按GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964針對中國50 Hz電網設定。雖然標稱頻率相同，但跳閘窗口、重連順序、無功曲線形狀和有功響應斜率可能與ONEE或ENTSO-E要求不同。中國逆變器通常支持多市場配置；需要針對摩洛哥市場調整韌體參數。

gap.en: Confirm that the inverter model supports a Morocco / European 50 Hz grid profile. Provide ONEE or project engineer with a firmware settings sheet showing voltage and frequency trip thresholds, reconnection delay, reactive-power curve, and any active-power reduction ramp. Do not ship with factory-default China-only settings without verification against ONEE requirements.
gap.zh: 确认逆变器型号支持摩洛哥/欧洲50 Hz电网配置文件。向ONEE或项目工程师提供固件设置表，显示电压和频率跳闸阈值、重连延时、无功曲线和有功降功率斜率。出货前应核验ONEE要求，不得以仅适用中国的出厂默认设置出货。
gap.zht: 確認逆變器型號支持摩洛哥／歐洲50 Hz電網配置文件。向ONEE或項目工程師提供韌體設定表，顯示電壓和頻率跳閘閾值、重連延時、無功曲線和有功降功率斜率。出貨前應核驗ONEE要求，不得以僅適用中國的出廠默認設定出貨。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory parameter compliance for grid connection under ONEE technical rules; firmware settings are a project-commissioning requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese grid-connection inspection and acceptance; China settings are not directly transferable

source.publisher: Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable (ONEE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] 50 Hz frequency is shared between China and Morocco, but grid parameter windows differ. Provide an ONEE-compatible settings sheet and confirm inverter firmware supports the Moroccan grid profile before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国和摩洛哥均为50 Hz，但电网参数窗口有差异。应提供与ONEE兼容的设置表，并在调试前确认逆变器固件支持摩洛哥电网配置文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國和摩洛哥均為50 Hz，但電網參數窗口有差異。應提供與ONEE兼容的設定表，並在調試前確認逆變器韌體支持摩洛哥電網配置文件。
